title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 24 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 24 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 24 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 24/06/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures opened with a slight drop, with the most-traded contract I2509 eventually closing at 703 yuan/mt, down 0.42% for the day.Traders sold goods in line with market conditions. Steel mills showed a strong desire to bargain down prices, with transactions mainly concluded at lower prices. The market transaction atmosphere was average.
